order_number.orig_str: शासन शुध्दीपत्र क्रमांकः संकीर्ण-२०२५/प्र.क्र. ३१/क्षमता बांधणी ई क्र. १३५०५७९

para_trans: Officers and staff of various cadres under the Public Health Department of the State.
In line with the MoU signed with IofC Panchgani Satara for knowledge and skills enhancement, administrative approval for the cost of training sessions has been given.
